rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELENORE H. MOSHER TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer overruled. Conservatorship does not, as a matter of law, terminate conservatee's right to revoke a revocable trust. Conservatorship of Bookasta (1989) 216 Cal.App.3d 445. Capacity of Elenore Mosher to execute the 2005 will revoking the 1996 trust should be determined in the Elenore Mosher probate proceedings. Contest of the 1996 trust should be stayed pending determination of the will contest in the probate proceedings.
